tasks.label: Update all subtrees
args: git subtree pull --prefix=addons/flyout_button https://github.com/Shilo/flyout-button.git addon --squash; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; git subtree pull --prefix=addons/neocade_theme https://github.com/Shilo/NeoCade-Theme.git addon --squash; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }
